name: Deepfactor
description: Application security observability platform using runtime instrumentation to detect vulnerabilities and compliance issues in running apps.

seo.title: Deepfactor — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Deepfactor: Application security observability platform using runtime instrumentation to detect vulnerabilities and compliance issues in running apps.

when_to_use: Runtime security scanning for vulnerabilities in running apps
Compliance policy enforcement via runtime instrumentation
Detect insecure API calls from application behavior
Shift-left security observability in staging pipelines

pros: Runtime instrumentation finds real exploit paths
Combines SCA, SBOM and runtime in one tool
Reduces noise vs static SAST/SCA scanners
cons: Overlaps heavily with Snyk, Aqua and Sysdig
Enterprise sales process for most features
review.verdict: Runtime-aware AppSec with useful signal-to-noise gains, but crowded field dominated by bigger names.
review.best_for: AppSec teams prioritizing exploitable runtime vulnerabilities over static scan volume.
review.not_for: Teams already invested in Snyk or Sysdig runtime security.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
